checks: POS flow order (draft -> complete -> receipt) is correctly represented
open shift dependency is enforced before completion when shift tracking is enabled
receipt listing and reprint endpoints are aligned to page flow
refund and settlement actions are represented in workflow

manual_mismatches.issue: customers.read prerequisite missing for page-open/list behavior.
USER_NOT_FOUND used as common error though customer service missing-record behavior is null-style in this flow.
Conditional credit-sale permission (sales.credit.create) was missing from prerequisites.
Permission matrix collapsed to sales.write; missing sales.read / sales.credit.settle / sales.return.without-receipt distinctions.
Common errors did not include settlement-positive constraint guidance.
Prerequisites did not separate shifts.open vs shifts.close action scope.
Common error list used POS-centric message instead of branch scope restriction from shifts service.
Swahili entry had English prerequisite lines.

changes: added customers.read prerequisite for view access
refined error guidance for payment method and credit permission
added shifts page as explicit upstream dependency
expanded permissions by action: sales.read, sales.write, sales.credit.settle, sales.return.without-receipt
added SETTLEMENT_AMOUNT_MUST_BE_POSITIVE and tightened settlement/refund guidance
split prerequisites into shifts.open and shifts.close action scopes
replaced POS-centric error entry with BRANCH_SCOPED_ROLE_RESTRICTION

unresolved_followups.item: Receipts frontend currently gates action buttons by sales.write while backend enforces finer-grained permissions for settlement and return-without-receipt.
